text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Scouting Programs 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BOY SCOUTS CASCADE PACIFIC COUNCIL SCOUTING PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides and oversees the Cub Scouts, Scouts BSA, Exploring, Sea Scouts, and Venturing programs. The scouting programs offer recreational and life-skill building activities. 9700 SW Nimbus Avenue Beaverton, OR 97008 Eligibility: Cub Scouts: Grades K-5 Scouts BSA: Ages 11-17 Exploring: Ages 14-20 Sea Scouts and Venturing: Ages 14-20 Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 225-5777 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GIRL SCOUTS OF OREGON AND SOUTHWEST WASHINGTON GIRL SCOUTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a leadership development organization for girls emphasizing community volunteering and building social connections. Troop members work on developing their skills in the outdoors, STEM, entrepreneurship and life skills like mental wellness, career exploration, and more. 9620 SW Barbur Boulevard Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Youth in grades K-12 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (800) 338-5248 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BOY SCOUTS CASCADE PACIFIC COUNCIL SCOUTING PROGRAMS GIRL SCOUTS OF OREGON AND SOUTHWEST WASHINGTON GIRL SCOUTS
